neqsim.process.safety.api14c.Api14cSafeChartBuilder

Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.api14c
API RP 14C / ISO 10418 Safety Analysis (SAFE) chart classes.

  • Uses of Api14cSafeChartBuilder in neqsim.process.safety.api14c

    Methods in neqsim.process.safety.api14c that return Api14cSafeChartBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Api14cSafeChartBuilder
    Api14cSafeChartBuilder.build(ProcessSystem process)
    Builds the SAFE chart from the given ProcessSystem.
    Api14cSafeChartBuilder
    Api14cSafeChartBuilder.buildAssumingComplete(ProcessSystem process)
    Convenience method that builds the chart assuming every required device is present (useful for "what should this facility have?"
    Api14cSafeChartBuilder
    Api14cSafeChartBuilder.declarePresent(String equipmentName, Set<Api14cDeviceType> present)
    Declares which devices are installed on a piece of equipment.
